disclaimer: The contents of this app are sourced from various wikis hosted by Wikimedia. The app creator cannot therefore guarantee the validity of the information.
enter_title_before_submit: Enter the title before hitting the Editor button
footer_disclaimer: All content in this application is sourced from Wikipedia and Wikimedia Commons. The developer of this app is not responsible for the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of the information provided. The accuracy and validity of the content are the responsibility of the contributors to each Wikipedia article.
footer_license: Texts and images are licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike License (CC BY-SA). You are free to share and adapt the material, provided you give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made.\n\nSpecific Attributions: 1) The ornament Ni'oŵeŵemagai is by Lewi Zega via Wikimedia Commons; 2) The image Woman Reading a Book on Lap is by Prasanna Kumar via Wikimedia Commons. For more details, visit the Wikipedia Terms of Use and the Creative Commons License.
no_shortcuts_available: No shortcuts available for this language
onboarding_greeting_description: Explore Wikipedia in local languages in Indonesia. One app many languages.
onboarding_language_description: Choose Wikipedia in your language from 11 languages in Indonesia.
onboarding_bookmark_description: Keep a collection of the pages you want to read later.
onboarding_share_description: Share the article you like or edit the ones you want to improve. Right from the Floating Action Bar.
onboarding_search_description: Find the information you want, straight on the home page.
onboarding_shortcuts_description: Find shortcuts to frequent visited pages right on the navigation bar.
onboarding_reference_description: See the reference in the text by clicking on its number.
onboarding_setting_description: Set the font size and dark/light mode as your eyes prefer it.
onboarding_wiki_description: Select the Wikipedia you want to access. You can change this later in Settings.
search_no_results: No results found for your query
title: Title
webview_mobile_warning: This Main Page is not yet fully mobile friendly. Some contents may not display as intended. You can help improve this page, i.e. encourage the administrator to improve the Main Page by following the Wikimedia's recommendations for mobile-friendly articles (Search for "Recommendations for mobile friendly articles on Wikimedia wikis")
